use_cases: Selection UI for multi-step wizards or onboarding flows
Number or option selection in pricing tier selectors
Quantity picker for e-commerce product configurations
Tab-style navigation with glass morphism aesthetic
Settings panel option selection in modern SaaS dashboards
ai_summary: A 3D-styled radio group component with glass morphism effects featuring a frosted glass container with inner border and a vertical selector stack. Each option displays as a pill with an animated ball indicator that shows the selected state. The component uses backdrop-filter blur, layered shadows, and depth effects to create a premium tactile appearance suitable for modern SaaS interfaces.
